name: Option A: Milled Aluminum Rib
loadCase: High braking load with moderate torsion
risk: Longer machining time and more material waste
recommendation: Good baseline option for fast production review

name: Option B: Titanium Lattice Form
loadCase: High braking load with high torsion
risk: Higher cost and added validation needs
recommendation: Best technical performer for deeper engineering review

name: Option C: Composite Web Structure
loadCase: Medium braking load with low torsion
recommendation: Lightest option, but safety margin needs more review

name: Option D: Hybrid Aluminum Pocket
recommendation: Strong balance of weight, safety, cost, and build time
